title: Importance of Accessibility
description: A project designed to highlight the importance of web accessibility. It uses ARIA roles and attributes to improve screen reader support and ensures full keyboard navigation for a better user experience across all abilities.

title: Houser's Workshop
description: A small creative studio helping local businesses build websites and improve their marketing strategies. I work directly with clients to design custom, responsive sites and offer support with branding.

title: TheSonoraGrill
description: A website redesign for TheSonoraGrill a local mexican resturant in ogden. Collaborated closely with the restaurant owner and manager to resdesign the ewbsite for beter aligmnet with the restaurant's brand identity and overall aesthetic.

title: BookHive
description: A collaborative library app that helps users track reading, discover new books, and enage with others thorugh discussion posts. It also allows users to create personal shelves to enhance organization and book management.
